uplink.description: Status report: door/window open, glass intact (TTN example input)
Status report: door/window closed, glass intact
uplink._note: Synthetic, in-bounds. Closed-state counterpart of the TTN status example (bytes[4]=0x00); upstream r718da2_r718db2_r718f2.js decodes this as status1=0. battery byte 0x1E (30) -> 3.0 V.

uplink.description: Status report: door/window open, glass broken, low battery
uplink._note: Synthetic, in-bounds. battery byte 0x9E sets the high (low-battery) bit; 0x9E & 0x7F = 0x1E (30) -> 3.0 V. status1=1 (open), status2=1 (glass broken). Upstream renders Volt as '3(low battery)'.

uplink.description: Device-info / startup frame carries no measurement (reportType 0x00)
Config-report response on fPort 7 carries no measurement
